notes: Black-box run; not this repo's site. Pixel screenshots could not be captured: the Playwright MCP browser_take_screenshot timed out (5s) on every attempt INCLUDING a blank data: page, so it is an environment/tool limit, not a site issue. Visual/responsive checks were therefore done via DOM snapshots, computed-style/overflow measurement, and content-presence, not images. Shopify store served on the public domain (no preview redirect).

console_network::https://trykepos.com/::.checked: Loaded, settled, scrolled full page to trigger lazy assets; collected console (errors+warnings) and full network list; measured broken images (0 of 225); checked all requests for 4xx/5xx and failures.

findings.summary: Splide carousel throws 'RangeError: Maximum call stack size exceeded' in an infinite emit/dispatch loop
findings.detail: splide@4.1.4 (cdn.jsdelivr.net) recurses dispatch->emit->set->emit and overflows the stack. Fires ~6x on every clean load and multiplies to 12-27+ on each window resize / scroll reflow. The 6 carousels still render and function, but the homepage floods the console with stack-overflow errors, churns the main thread, and risks degraded performance on low-end devices and noise in error monitoring. Stack: Object.dispatch / emit / m / g / DocumentFragment.<anonymous> / n.emit / l[as set] / i.set, all in splide.min.js:8.

GET https://cached.rebuyengine.com/api/v1/user/config?shop=7f421a-3.myshopify.com => FAILED net::ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED (x2). Third-party Rebuy personalization endpoint; no Rebuy widget was visibly required on the homepage. Could affect cross-sell/recommendation widgets where Rebuy is used elsewhere.

findings.summary: Facebook tracking pixel blocked by browser (ERR_BLOCKED_BY_ORB)
findings.detail: GET https://www.facebook.com/privacy_sandbox/pixel/register/trigger/ => FAILED net::ERR_BLOCKED_BY_ORB (x2). Browser-level block of a third-party tracking pixel (Blotout/Meta). Not the store's code; tracking-only.

findings.summary: Gorgias warns no chat widget installed for this store
findings.detail: [WARNING] No Gorgias chat widget installed or found for this Shopify store (7f421a-3) @ config.gorgias.chat. Benign third-party config warning.

functional::https://trykepos.com/::deskt.checked: Header nav: 'Learn' dropdown is a proper hover-revealed menu (opacity:0/pointer-events:none by default; Benefits->/pages/benefits, Proof->/pages/proof). All 11 internal nav/footer/CTA destinations return HTTP 200 (product, benefits, proof, about, cart, blogs, 4 policies, account login). JS-driven nav targets verified present: '.oke-reviewsTab' (Reviews link), '#technical-reviews' (Read their reviews jump), '#MainContent' (skip link). 'They tried everything' tabs (Bloating/Regularity/Gut Barrier) switch active state correctly. Footer newsletter email field present (not submitted - live form). Footer columns (Shop/Learn/Inquire) all populated with resolving links.

findings.summary: FAQ items show a pointer cursor but clicking does not expand/collapse
findings.detail: Each of the 9 FAQ headers has cursor:pointer, implying an accordion, but clicking a header does not change the FAQ container height and all answers are already rendered/visible. Content is fully readable, so no information is lost; the pointer cursor just implies interactivity that isn't there. Likely an all-expanded/static Q&A by design.

functional::https://trykepos.com/::mobil.checked: Mobile hamburger (.burger-menu / .ante-nav-mobile-menu-toggle): on a clean load a real tap on the visible burger icon opens the menu (adds 'open' class, panel slides from translateX(-280px) to left:0, overlay shown). All nav items present in the open menu (Shop, Learn, About, FAQ, Reviews, Start Now, Account, Cart). 'Learn' submenu expands to Benefits/Proof. Tapping the background overlay closes the menu. (Note: earlier 'menu won't open' observations were state pollution from repeated programmatic toggles, not a real bug - confirmed working on clean load.)

findings.summary: Mobile menu 'Close menu' (X) button renders at 0x0 and is not tappable
findings.detail: The dedicated .ante-mobile-nav-close (role=button, aria-label='Close menu') computes to 0x0 because its container .ante-mobile-nav-header is display:none. So there is no visible X to close the menu; users must tap the background overlay (works) or re-tap the burger. Minor UX gap - some users expect an explicit close control. Closing is still achievable, so not a blocker.

responsive::https://trykepos.com/::deskt.checked: Measured horizontal overflow at 1440x900: scrollWidth==clientWidth==1440, overflow 0px, no culprits. Desktop nav renders. No image capture (tool limit - see top-level notes).

responsive::https://trykepos.com/::table.checked: Measured horizontal overflow at 768x1024: overflow 0px, no culprits. Nav renders in desktop mode (burger hidden) at this width.

responsive::https://trykepos.com/::mobil.checked: Measured horizontal overflow at 375x812: overflow 0px, no culprits. Hamburger nav shown. No image capture (tool limit).

visual::https://trykepos.com/::desktop-1.checked: Content-presence (image capture unavailable - tool limit). All key sections present in DOM: hero ('Reverse gut aging.'), benefits ('fresh start for your whole body'), proof ('leading health experts'), guarantee ("you don't pay"), FAQ, reviews ('Rated 4.7/5'), footer. Single H1, 14 CTAs. 0 of 225 images broken. No price on homepage by design (pre-sell page; all CTAs route to /products/human-milk-bioactives).

visual::https://trykepos.com/::tablet-76.checked: Content-presence at 768 (no image capture). Same content set present; layout reflows without overflow; desktop nav retained.

visual::https://trykepos.com/::mobile-37.checked: Content-presence at 375 (no image capture). All sections present; no horizontal overflow; hamburger nav functional.
